subject: Boxnet loading extremely slow
body:
Hi Warpers,

Search brought up a couple previous similar messages but no helpful info, and I guess this might not be an easy fix but I’ll try just in case:
On a Windows 10 workstation with Geforce RTX 3090, Warp 1.0.9, BoxNet2Mask_20180531 from public repository
Loading the boxnet model, either upon start processing, or upon first test picking one micrograph, takes a very long time, >10 minutes, with the “loading boxnet model” message hanging, and Windows periodically declaring Warp is not responding, then recovering in ~1 minute cycles.

Is this a bug others have had and can I provide more info to make this more useful?

All the best
Teige
